name: Wilshire Consumer Credit
description_short: Wilshire Consumer Credit offers personal loans through an online account management platform with phone support available Monday-Friday during business hours.
description_long:
Wilshire Consumer Credit, operating under parent company Wilshire Commercial Capital L.L.C., is a personal loan lender based in Los Angeles, California. The company maintains a physical headquarters at 4727 Wilshire Boulevard, Suite 100, Los Angeles, CA 90010, and operates a digital lending platform accessible via their MyAccount portal at myaccount.wilshireconsumer.com.

The company provides personal loan services with an account management system that allows borrowers to access their loan information online. They offer a mobile application designed for account management and payment tracking, enabling customers to receive account alerts and manage their loans remotely without phone contact. The platform includes features for payment options, account registration, and password recovery, suggesting a standardized consumer lending operation.

Wilshire Consumer Credit distinguishes itself through dedicated customer support available during extended weekday hours (7 AM - 7 PM PT Monday-Friday, 7 AM - 12 PM PT Saturday) via phone at (800) 589-0290. The company provides educational resources including credit education materials, benefits information for military customers, and comprehensive FAQs. They also offer insurance claim submission capabilities and accept multiple payment methods through their platform.

Based on available information, this is a straightforward online personal loan provider with standard digital banking infrastructure. However, the website provides minimal information about loan amounts, terms, APR rates, eligibility requirements, or application processes. No details are available regarding loan purposes (consolidation, home improvement, medical, etc.), funding speed, or specific product offerings. The lack of transparent pricing and product details on their public-facing website limits comprehensive assessment of their competitive positioning.
pros: Extended customer support hours (7 AM - 7 PM PT weekdays, 7 AM - 12 PM PT Saturdays)
Mobile app available for on-the-go account management and payment
Online account management portal with secure login
Credit education resources provided to customers
cons: Website provides no information about loan amounts, terms, or APR rates
No details about eligibility requirements or application process
Minimal transparency regarding specific loan products or purposes
Limited information about funding timelines or approval process
Website does not disclose loan purpose categories (consolidation, medical, etc.)
best_for: Borrowers seeking online loan account management and payment flexibility
Military members accessing dedicated military benefits programs
Customers preferring phone support during extended business hours
diagnosis: Wilshire Consumer Credit is a legitimate online personal loan provider with established customer support infrastructure and military-focused services, but prospective borrowers should contact them directly via phone or website registration to obtain specific information about loan products, rates, terms, and eligibility requirements, as this critical information is not published on their publicly accessible web pages.
services: Personal loan origination and account management
Online MyAccount portal for loan access
